g.text: Q22: Workforce wellbeing by dimension — aggregate pulse readings
Business question: Across the wellbeing dimensions we track, what is the
average, lowest and highest pulse score, and how many readings fall below
Returns: wellbeing dimension, reading count, avg / min / max score, count below 5.0
Aggregates mi:WellbeingPulse by mi:wellbeingDimension — a portfolio view distinct
from HC5 (per-worker rows < 5.0) and HC7 (the anti-stack-rank guardrail join).
